flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Metropolitan State University of Denver rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($27.5k → $30.7k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Metropolitan State University of Denver rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.0k → $11.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Metropolitan State University of Denver fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Metropolitan State University of Denver rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (10.8% → 12.3%).
